steps.title: Find the center
steps.content:
The circle equation is in standard form.
$$(x-4)^2+(y+7)^2=25$$
So the center is $(4,-7)$.

steps.title: Use the midpoint fact
steps.content:
The center is the midpoint of the endpoints of a diameter. Let the other endpoint be $(u,v)$. Then
$$\frac{9+u}{2}=4$$
$$\frac{-7+v}{2}=-7$$

steps.title: Solve for the other endpoint
steps.content: Solve each coordinate equation to get the endpoint across the center from $P$. $$9+u=8$$ $$u=-1$$ $$-7+v=-14$$ $$v=-7$$ The answer is A.
